src/goveeLan/gsupport

  • Index
Search:
Group by:
  • Imports
  • Types
    • GDEVICES_ENUM
  • Consts
    • G_SUPPORTED_DEVICES
  • Procs
        isSupported
      • isSupported(sku: string): bool
        skuToEnum
      • skuToEnum(sku: string): GDEVICES_ENUM
Source   Edit  

Arrays of supported device SKUs concatenated into one array along with some procs and a magically created string enum from the power of macros.

Taken from Govee Developer Docs | Supported Product Models.

GDEVICES_ENUM is created using arrayutils: strEnum.

I don't know what else to write here other than what I already did...

Imports

core/arrayutils

Types

GDEVICES_ENUM = enum
  H5051, H5071, H5080, H5081, H5082, H5083, H5086, H5100, H5103, H5127, H5160,
  H5161, H5179, H6002, H6003, H6004, H6006, H6008, H6009, H600A, H600D, H6010,
  H6011, H601A, H601B, H601C, H601D, H6020, H6022, H6038, H6039, H6042, H6043,

Consts

Concatenated array of all supported device SKUs. Made using arrayutils: & Source   Edit  

Procs

proc isSupported(sku: string): bool {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Source   Edit   
proc skuToEnum(sku: string): GDEVICES_ENUM {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
